description: Manage professional certification renewals by creating an actionable compliance dashboard. The dashboard must include expiration urgency tracking, visual status alerts, aggregated renewal costs, and CE credit completion verification. Ensure the final records are sorted by priority.

natural_language.prompt: Transform the certification tracking spreadsheet into a compliance dashboard. Add calculations for days until expiration using TODAY(), categorize status (EXPIRED/URGENT/CURRENT/FUTURE) with color coding, sum renewal costs, check CE credit completion, and sort by urgency.
